specific_promise: The reader will learn specific physiological consequences of incorrect herbal dosing — not just 'it can be dangerous' but what actually happens in the body when you get the dose wrong.
delivery_test: The body must contain at least one concrete physiological consequence of incorrect herbal dosing (e.g., immune overstimulation, liver enzyme effects, reduced bioavailability, therapeutic failure, specific side effects like nausea or drowsiness).
minimum_delivery: Begin in Section 1 (Lead) or Section 2 (Problem Expansion). Substantially resolved before Section 4 (Pivot).
